completedPhaseClaims.summary: Created in-progress bug packet for topic lifecycle duplicate seed failure. No source, test, parent artifact, or certification-owned fields modified.
Implemented owned topic lifecycle E2E fixture isolation in tests/e2e/test_topic_lifecycle.sh while preserving topics_name_key.

Focused red reproduced the pricing duplicate, focused green passed twice with a pre-existing pricing topic, ./smackerel.sh check passed, regression-quality guard passed, and broad shell E2E reached 34/34 passing.

Validated BUG-003-001 closure from existing report evidence and the later c6d2b26 full E2E baseline: test_topic_lifecycle.sh passes with a pre-existing pricing topic, lifecycle assertions run against owned fixture data, and the broad suite no longer reports topics_name_key.
Audited bug packet consistency: bug.md, scopes.md, uservalidation.md, report.md, and state.json agree on Fixed/Verified/Closed status with edits confined to the BUG-003-001 packet.

executionHistory.summary: Packetized uncovered broad E2E blocker for the spec 003 topic lifecycle scenario.

Implemented owned topic lifecycle E2E fixture isolation in tests/e2e/test_topic_lifecycle.sh. Focused red reproduced topics_name_key for pricing, focused green passed twice with pre-existing pricing, ./smackerel.sh check passed, broad shell E2E reached 34/34 passing, and broad overall exited 1 from Go E2E failures outside BUG-003-001. Certification fields were not modified.

Validated closure from existing evidence: focused topic lifecycle E2E passes with pre-existing pricing, lifecycle assertions run against topic-lifecycle-owned fixture data, broad shell E2E passed 34/34, and c6d2b26 had full E2E GREEN.
Audited packet closeout fields and report evidence formatting before final artifact lint. Edits remained confined to the BUG-003-001 packet.

failures.summary: test_topic_lifecycle.sh duplicate topic insert violated topics_name_key for pricing before the bug fix.
